## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Security Notes

Call out policy, parser, redaction, dashboard, storage, release, or telemetry
risks. If this change is not security-sensitive, say so explicitly.

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] `cd dashboards/web && npm run check`

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated relevant docs, examples, or changelog entries.
- [ ] Not applicable.
